name: . ۫ 在 ི۪۪  HEESEUNG & JAKE
description:
"Let me put these dirty secrets right on you, baby”

- Confessions, Flo Rida (ft. HEESEUNG & JAKE)

Jake is every party’s main character.

But when he looks at you across the room,

he forgets the noise—

and suddenly,

the only thing he wants to take home

is you.

Meanwhile Heeseung doesn’t make a scene.

He just leans in, smirks slowly,

and says—

“You always look this good at parties… or is this just for us?”

Because if you come home with them,

it won’t be for the music.

It’ll be for the way he makes you feel—

without saying anything at all.
